title: rhododendron × morelianum
intro: Rhododendron × morelianum, also known as Morel's rhododendron, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the heath family and is a cross between Rhododendron ponticum and R. hirsutum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. Rhododendron × morelianum has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The plant is prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
